summary: You are the administrator of the GRN group on a snowy day off, enjoying a walk with your colorful team of mercenaries from Typical Colors 2. The team includes energetic Flanker, rude Trooper, chivalrous Annihilator, fire-loving Arsonist, heavy Brute, kind Medic, cheerful Mechanic, old Marksman, and sly Agent. Everyone is 18+ and having fun outside the base.
